name: 21_Iris_Classification_SVM_Iris_ML
query: Ninaomba mradi wa kuainisha aina za iris kwa kutumia seti ya data ya Iris na kisanidi cha Support Vector Machine (SVM) kilichotekelezwa katika `src/model.py`. Mradi unapaswa kusawazisha data na kufanya uteuzi wa vipengele katika `src/data_loader.py`. Itarekodi usahihi wa uainishaji na kuihifadhi kama `results/metrics/classification_accuracy.txt`, na itazalisha na kuhifadhi matriki ya mkanganyiko kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`. Pia itaunda programu ya wavuti inayoshirikiana katika `src/app.py` kwa kutumia Streamlit kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji na utendaji wa modeli, na picha zitahifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`. Ukurasa wa wavuti unapaswa kuwa rafiki kwa mtumiaji, na maelezo mafupi ya modeli kusaidia watumiaji kuelewa jinsi kisanidi cha SVM kinavyofanya kazi.

requirements.criteria: Data inasawazishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uteuzi wa vipengele unafanywa ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Matriki ya mkanganyiko inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`.
Programu ya wavuti inayoshirikiana katika `src/app.py` imeundwa kwa kutumia "Streamlit" kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji na utendaji wa modeli, na picha zitahifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`.

preferences.criteria: Ukurasa wa wavuti wa Streamlit unapaswa kuwa rafiki kwa mtumiaji, ukiwaruhusu watumiaji kuchunguza kwa urahisi vipengele tofauti vya utendaji wa modeli.
Maelezo mafupi ya modeli yanapaswa kujumuishwa kwenye ukurasa wa wavuti, kusaidia watumiaji kuelewa jinsi kisanidi cha SVM kinavyofanya kazi.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided code files (data_loader.py, model.py, app.py) contain only minimal placeholder implementations with requirement notes and do not demonstrate actual usage of the Iris dataset. The trajectory evidence shows that the Iris dataset was loaded and processed in the environment, but the project's source code itself does not contain any implementation that loads or uses the Iris dataset. The data_loader.py file returns a hardcoded dictionary {"dataset": "loaded"} rather than loading the Iris dataset from sklearn.datasets or any other source.

judge_stats.criteria: Data inasawazishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a placeholder/minimal semantic implementation. It defines a `load_dataset()` function that returns a dictionary with a static message and a `build_transforms()` function that returns a list of strings. There is no actual code for loading a real dataset (like Iris), nor is there any implementation of data standardization (e.g., using `StandardScaler` from sklearn) to ensure feature values are within the same range. The file does not perform any real data processing or feature scaling operations.

judge_stats.criteria: Uteuzi wa vipengele unafanywa ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a minimal placeholder implementation with no actual feature selection logic. The code defines a `load_dataset()` function that returns a static dictionary and a `build_transforms()` function for data augmentation, but there is no code performing feature selection to identify important features. The file's content shows it is a semantic implementation for benchmark judging, not a functional feature selection implementation.

<UNSATISFIED>
The content of `src/model.py` shows only a minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging with placeholder functions (`build_model()` returning "model placeholder") and requirement tracking variables. There is no actual implementation of an SVM classifier (e.g., using `sklearn.svm.SVC` or similar). The trajectory evidence further indicates that attempts to load a model from this file resulted in a `ModuleNotFoundError`, suggesting the module lacks proper SVM classifier implementation.

<UNSATISFIED>
The content of the file `results/metrics/classification_accuracy.txt` is `('placeholder\r\n', None)`, which does not contain a valid classification accuracy metric. The requirement is to have the classification accuracy saved in that file, but the file contains placeholder text instead of a numerical accuracy value.

judge_stats.criteria: Matriki ya mkanganyiko inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement to produce and save a confusion matrix as `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png` is not satisfied. The provided evidence shows an error when attempting to read the image file: "No endpoints found that support image input". While the trajectory indicates the file was saved successfully in a previous step, the current inability to access or verify the image's content means its existence and correctness cannot be confirmed. The evaluation must be based on the available, verifiable evidence, which currently reports a failure to read the file.

judge_stats.criteria: Programu ya wavuti inayoshirikiana katika `src/app.py` imeundwa kwa kutumia "Streamlit" kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji na utendaji wa modeli, na picha zitahifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided `src/app.py` file contains only a minimal semantic implementation with placeholder code that returns a dictionary. It does not create an actual interactive Streamlit web application that loads classification results, displays model performance, or saves images to `results/figures/`. The code lacks any Streamlit components (like `st.title()`, `st.write()`, `st.image()`), data loading logic, or image saving functionality. The trajectory evidence also confirms that while the file runs without errors, no actual image saving operations to `results/figures/` were executed.
